div.head: 215. Editorial Note
div.p:
The Migratory Labor agreement between Mexico and the United States, which entered into force on August 11, 1951, was extended
to December 31, 1956, by exchange of notes between Mexican Foreign Minister Padilla Nervo and Ambassador White on December 23 in Mexico City. For text of the Migratory Labor agreement of August 11, 1951, see United States Treaties and Other International Agreements (UST) 1951, volume 2 (part 2), page 1940. For text of the notes extending the agreement, see 6 UST (pt. 5) 6058. Documentation on the subject is in Department of State, Central File 811.06(M).
